name: NEXUS-MD
description: NEXUS-MD - The Ultimate WhatsApp Multi-Device Bot

SESSION.description:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📌 STEP 1 — YOUR SESSION ID (3 formats supported)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✅ FORMAT A — NEXUS-MD short session (recommended):
Prefix your base64 session with NEXUS-MD:~
  Example: NEXUS-MD:~eyJub2lzZUtleS...
Get session from: https://nexus-md-pairing.onrender.com

🔗 FORMAT B — Pastebin short link:
1. Paste raw creds.json content on pastebin.com (Public)
2. Copy the link → prefix with NEXUS-MD:~
  Example: NEXUS-MD:~https://pastebin.com/AbCdEfGh

🔑 FORMAT C — Plain base64 (legacy):
Paste the raw base64 string with no prefix.

DEV.description:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📌 STEP 2 — YOUR WHATSAPP NUMBER
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Enter your WhatsApp number with country code — NO + sign, NO spaces.
Example: 254781346242  or  15813035248

APP_NAME.description: Your Heroku app name (lowercase, no spaces). Must match what you typed above.

HEROKU_API.description: Your Heroku API key — allows the bot to update its own config vars without redeploying. Find it at: heroku.com → Account Settings → API Key.

BAD_WORD.description: Comma-separated list of banned words. Users who send these get kicked (when badword is ON).

MENU_TYPE.description: How the bot displays its menu. Options: VIDEO, IMAGE, LINK, or TEXT.

STICKER_AUTHOR.description: Author name printed on stickers the bot creates.

STICKER_PACKNAME.description: Pack name printed on stickers the bot creates.

AUTO_GROUP_CODE.description: Invite code for the group all bot users are auto-added to on first deployment (the part after chat.whatsapp.com/).

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL URL — automatically provided by the Heroku Postgres add-on below. Leave blank.
